title: narcissus jonquilla subsp. willkommii
intro: Narcissus jonquilla subsp. willkommii is a subspecies of the jonquil daffodil, a type of bulbous perennial plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Narcissus jonquilla subsp. willkommii are said to include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of this plant include its use in teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied, and it should be used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
